details.title: Restless Wing Syndrome
details.description:
In Restless Wing Syndrome, you play as a hungry pigeon scavenging the city rooftops for delicious morsels of bread. However, you were born with a condition that causes your wings to spontaneously flap, shooting you upward. Luckily, you know just how long you have between each wing spasm, thanks to your trusty Flap Meter.
Time your movements in conjunction with your flaps to cross gaps, avoid spikes, and glide across hazards to reach each delectable slice of bread in this puzzle-platformer.Listen to the music here :)
MADE IN: Game Maker Studio 2
PALETTE: Pear36 by PineappleOnPizza
FONT USED: Acknowledge by Brian Kent

game.title: A Key(s) Path
game.short_text: Use your movement keys as platforms to progress

details.title: A Key(s) Path
details.description:
A Key(s) Path
- By Geegaz -


Build your way with your own keys.
With your 3 movement keys (Left, Right, Jump) available at the bottom of the screen, you can drag them in the world to use them as platforms. But don't use too many, or you could run out of movement options !
Because as soon as one is placed, you can't use it for movement. It will be locked until you retrieve the key from the world.


A Key(s) Path is a winner of the GMTK Game Jam 2020, with the theme "Out of Control". Here is GMTK's video with the jam results !


Controls
The game is played with a mouse & keyboard (controllers are not supported and will not work properly)
Move: Left and Right arrow / A and D / Q and DJump: Up arrow / W / Z / Space
Place Key: Drag & drop the key from the barRetrieve Key: Click the key in the world / Click the empty spot in the bottom barRetrieve All Keys: Shift
Pause / Quit: EscapeFullscreen: F11

Credits
Made with Godot 3.3.4All design, code and graphics and fonts by me.
SFX: Interface Sounds & Impact Sounds by Kenney, Wind in Trees by HzandbitsMusic: Reflexions by Lavalamp
Report issues, find the source code and previous versions here:Github repository

Edna - Out of sight, out of control

details.title: Two-Timin' Towers
details.description:
Note: This is an older version of the game. We have a NEW DEMO ON STEAM! Click below to play + wishlist for the upcoming full game!‎ ‎

_______
🏆 Winner of the 2020 GMTK Game Jam 🏆 
Welcome to Two-Timin' Towers – a tower defense game where your towers have friendly fire. Turning a classic game genre into a bullet hell!

Build towers to defeat increasingly challenging waves of enemies. But remember, each tower adds more bullets to the screen for you to narrowly avoid!

resultData.title: Between a Clock and a Hard Place

game.title: Between a Clock and a Hard Place
game.short_text: Physics based action/puzzle platformer. A young hero must retrieve a stolen magic clock from a mysterious entity.

details.title: Between a Clock and a Hard Place
details.description:
Ranked top 20 and featured in Mark Brown's Best Games from GMTK Jam 2020 video! Timestamp 19:18


If you want to see what else we're making, drop us a follow!
Programmer/designer: KIRAArtist: ALPHA6Musician: VICTORABDAMusician: RUSTOCRATMusician: AJ BOOKER

HTML5 Important Info


If the controls don't work try refreshing the window. Then click the run button without scrolling or pressing anything else. This is a known problem with HTML5 Itch uploads using this engine.
The HTML5 version might be laggy in some browsers. If the HTML5 version does not work for you, download the zip version below.

Story
A young hero is tasked with retrieving a stolen magic clock that can warp space and time. The hero makes it to some ruins, but an ancient trickster spirit has found the clock and wants to have some fun...

Theme
Out of Control theme connection: We interpreted this meaning "out of the player's control" rather than "chaotic"
The ancient spirit has the clock and is messing with you. The movement of the room cannot be controlled by the player. It can get out of hand if you do not take time to plan. However, you can interact with objects to influence your own movement and get to the exit, solve the ancient spirit's puzzles, and escape.

Controls
WASD to move
R to restart
Other controls are in the game

Credits
KIRA (aka KIRAROCI) (https://twitter.com/Kiraroci_)
Programming, game design, level design, sound effects, visual effects, writing, promotion
ALPHONSOSIX (https://alpha6.itch.io/)
Art assets
VICTORABDA (Victor and Rafael (Estúdio Oculto))
Music
RUSTOCRAT
Music (level theme)
AJ BOOKER (https://ajbooker.itch.io/) Music (title screen and intro)

Created in 48 hours for GMTK Jam 2020: Out of Control
Version

The game is currently After Jam version 1.5. With content we didn't get to implement during GMTK Jam because of time.
This was a Jam game and we are not planning on updating it more. But if you like what you see, drop us a follow, check out our other games!

game.title: Emergency Protocol
game.short_text: Control your robot - until you don't!

details.title: Emergency Protocol
details.description:
Control your robot – until you don’t!
  
Emergency Protocol is a puzzle game that requires you to plan ahead for moments in which your robot is out of reach. The original version is a submission to and winner of the 2020 GMTK Game Jam. Thank you so much to everyone who played, enjoyed and rated our game! 
After almost two weeks of work, we are finally ready to present you with our post-jam version! We’ve made the following changes:
  
6 brand new levels and edits to existing ones!
  Added support for Linux and Mac
  Adjustable and pauseable movement speed
  New and improved visuals and sound effects
  Options Menu and improved level select
  Level completion is now saved
  and a few secrets for you to discover!
  
If you are interested in supporting us, we have opened up donations. But we want to emphasize that donations are absolutely not necessary!
  
 
  
Emergency Protocol was developed by:
  
Tyrix – Programming and Design (https://tyrix.itch.io/)
  
Haru – Programming, Art and SFX (https://haruzter.itch.io/)
  
If you enjoyed Emergency Protocol and are interested in potential updates or future games from us, feel free to follow us on itch.
  
You can also join our discord to discuss the game and report any bugs you find: https://discord.gg/dqGh6Yj
  
Or, if you don’t have discord, send us an email at EmergencyProtocolGame@gmail.com
  
 
  
Special thanks to Jonas for creating the original jam SFX on short notice.
  1:  Extract the .zip file2:  Execute EmergencyProtocol

game.title: Dumber dwarves
game.short_text: Dumber Dwarves is a dungeon crawler where you can’t control the adventurers. And they are kind of stupid.

details.title: Dumber dwarves
details.description:
Dumber Dwarves is a dungeon crawler where you can’t control the adventurers directly and they are not the sharpest tool in the shed. Slap them or throw some meat on the battlefield to give your “instructions”.
The game was created in 48h (well, more like 35h) for the GMTK 2020 game jam. The theme was “Out of Control“. 
I did everything by myself on this one, but I didn't have time to add any sound or music.
How to play
Your goal is to steal all the GEMS.Click on a dwarf to SLAP him when he does something wrong Click anywhere to throw some FOOD to guide your adventurers. You might need to sleep them to get their attention.Click on FOOD to remove it.FOOD refills over time, or when stealing a GEM.
Controls
Left mouse button - slap dwarves, drop food or remove existing foodR - Restart levelK - Toggle "Kid" mode (I added this one for my 2yrs old boy)
Trivia
The game first started as a god game where you were to teach humans things by only slapping them. So, if a disciple was picking up some food for example, slapping him would teach him to avoid food (ie. “god thinks food is bad“). Problem was: a disciple who learn something tends to repeat the concept on its neighbors. So, someone who thinks food is bad will also slap other disciples picking it. It was even possible to slap someone slapping, so it would teach that slapping someone was bad. And so on :)
It was a funny little prototype, but too sandboxy to actually become an interesting jam game. Maybe with some extra work, but definitely not in 48h.

game.title: Crystal Ball Chaos
game.short_text: Launch items and enemies with chaotic magic!

details.title: Crystal Ball Chaos
details.description:
Version 1.2 (July 24th, 2020)
Additions:
Xbox controller support, but I'm not entirely sure it'll work for mac.Minor adjustments to some levels.
Bug fixes:
The UI is no longer scaled by the screen resolution (this could prevent it from being seen.)Jumping through a platform doesn't count as landing on the ground.
Version 1.1 (July 22nd, 2020)
Additions:
  
Added a timer that appears after completing the last level.
  Added SFX for attack swinging, attack connecting, projectile shooting, and launchable objects bouncing.
  Added more VFX for player moving, jumping, landing, and attack connected, and launchable object bouncing.
  Swinging animation for melee attacks.
  Brief hitpause when landing a melee attack on a launchable object.
  Added coyote time. There is a brief amount of time where the player can walk off a ledge and jump and still count as a grounded jump.
  
Bug fixes:
  
Standing on a crystal ball now counts as standing on the ground.
  Shooting a magic bullet under a platform no longer counts as a collision.
  
Coming soon...
Music?More SFX and  VFX?
Summary
  
A young wizard wanders into a dungeon deep underground. Upon entering the dungeon, she discovers that her magic is now far more sensitive and uncontrollable. Explore the dungeon by launching the crystal balls to their pedestals.
  
Programming, artwork, and sound design by Luke Martinez. For Lauren Barnett.
Controls
  
WASD to move, you can use space to jump and double jump. Aim with the mouse, attack with left click, and shoot with right click. Using a mouse is heavily advised.
I've been getting a lot of reports that the  game triggers windows defender or that some people have been not been able to play on mac. So if you run to either of those problems you can try this.
Search for "itch.io app" on your browser, download, and install the itch.io app.Open the app and then enter the link for this game within the app, it works just like a browser.Click the install button on the bottom right. Don't click the regular download buttons.Click downloads on the bottom left and you should be able to play the game with no problem!

game.title: Midnight Monorail
game.short_text: WINNER! GMTK GAME JAM 2020! Can you manage the monorail system you built?

details.title: Midnight Monorail
details.description:
TOP 20 WINNER of the GMTK 2020 Game Jam.
Welcome conductor, to the MIDNIGHT MONORAIL! It looks like you'll be stuck with the graveyard shift...
Build the tracks necessary to transport passengers to their stations. But watch out! Although you are able to build the tracks, trains will spawn out of your control, so it's your job to make sure they don't collide by using your ghostly abilities, letting them phase through one another!
After 5 collisions it's GAME OVER! How high of a score can you get?
CONTROLS:
Click to place tracks during build mode.Click on trains to make them incorporeal for a second to avoid collisions.
POST-JAM VERSION:
Misc bug fixes.Less starting lives, now harder to cheese it!Red radius around points now doesn't allow you to place points too close together!Trains are highlighted when hovered over.To play, simply download and unzip! Then run the EXE!

game.title: Losing CTRL
game.short_text: Ctrl+C Ctrl+V your way through this little Puzzle Game and help a robot friend navigate through different levels

details.title: Losing CTRL
details.description:
As part of the GMTK GameJam 2020 part of our team decided to participate and came up with this little game.
Ctrl+C Ctrl+V your way through this little Puzzle Game and help a robot friend navigate through different levels.

In "Losing Control" you help a little robot through a world that is falling apart only using his ability to copy and paste. You can select parts or the whole level by clicking and dragging on desktop or using the on screen buttons and touch on mobile browsers.

How to play
  
GOAL of the game is to lead the little ROBOT to the end of each level.
  
You can MOVE by using the ARROW KEYS or WASD and mobile users can use TOUCH and the KEYS ON SCREEN.
  
The world of Losing Control is breaking apart but the purple bot has the special ability to COPY and PASTE parts of the level like shown below.

There is only a limited amount of CTRL keys to solve each level. So be careful what you use them for. CTRL+C to copy and CTRL+V to paste affect not only the regular floor tiles but also duplicate the VOID surrounding the broken paths. Special Tiles like the END, LAVA, PICK UPS and the ROBOT itself can't be pasted or overwritten.
What about the lava, you say?`
Sometimes the floor is LAVA and it spreads each time you move the little robot.

Some levels come with additional CTRL keys to collect, when you walk over them.

Now you know everything you need to solve this little puzzle game!
Good Luck and don't lose control!

game.title: Shooty Ballz
game.short_text: Keep the green ball alive and protect it from.. YOURSELF! easy when you're in control, but what if you LOSE CONTROL?

details.title: Shooty Ballz
details.description:
Picked by Mark Brown himself as one of the Top 20 Games of the 2020 GMTK Game JamPost-Jam Update v1.1: A huge update! We are so excited about making the Top 20 in the GMTK 2020 Game Jam so we've put together an update to enhance player experience in Shooty Ballz!
- Shooting is more fun!
- UX Improvements to better communicate game state to players!
- Graphical updates!
- Juice dialed up to beyond maximum!
- Improved obstacles!
- Better mobility - use dash to dodge!
- Bug fixes.
Stay tuned for more releases! Follow swiney and arvz on twitter and watch this space! Shooty Ballz is in active development and we'll be posting more updates soon. A sneak peak at whats to come: powerups, more weapons, more enemy types, more juice.
Shooty Ballz is a Twin Stick Shooter with a bit of a twist! Your objective is to protect the green ball.. from yourself! Shoot EVERYTHING Except the green ball.
Pay attention to your Control Gauge. If it runs out, you will go Out of Control. 
Pink balls will combine into a bigger, aggressive Big Red ball if they come into contact with one another. 
Pink balls spawn yellow eggs when killed. These will hatch new Balls if left alone for too long. Collect the Yellow Eggs to replenish Control, or shoot them.
WASD MoveSPACE DashLeft ClickFire LaserRight ClickKnockaway Big EnemiesMouseAim
...and for those who like to fly close to the sun: 
Press 'Q' - Force yourself to Lose Control (v0.8 Game Jam version only)

Development: Sheng Xu, Arvin Gunawan
Main music: Goran Andrić
